name: Tennessee Cornmeal Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cornmeal, baking soda, sugar, and salt.
2. In a separate bowl, combine the remaining ingredients; add to dry ingredients, mixing well.
3. Preheat greased muffin pans in a 400 degree (F) oven for 3 minutes or until very hot.
4. Spoon batter into hot muffin pans, filling 3/4 full.
5. Bake at 400 degrees (F) for 25 minutes or until lightly browned.
